name: comprehensive-app-audit
description: Comprehensive audit of NILIN Homeservice app - analyzes all dashboards, workflows, API connections, data flows, and identifies bugs/issues

phases.title: Dashboard Analysis
phases.detail: Analyzing Customer, Provider, and Admin dashboards

phases.title: API & Backend Audit
phases.detail: Verifying routes, controllers, and data formats

phases.title: Mobile Build Audit
phases.detail: Checking Capacitor, Android, and iOS configurations

phases.title: State & Auth Audit
phases.detail: Analyzing state management and authentication flows

phases.title: Synthesis
phases.detail: Compiling all findings into actionable report

script:
export const meta = {
  name: 'comprehensive-app-audit',
  description: 'Comprehensive audit of NILIN Homeservice app - analyzes all dashboards, workflows, API connections, data flows, and identifies bugs/issues',
  phases: [
    { title: 'Project Discovery', detail: 'Mapping project structure and architecture' },
    { title: 'Dashboard Analysis', detail: 'Analyzing Customer, Provider, and Admin dashboards' },
    { title: 'API & Backend Audit', detail: 'Verifying routes, controllers, and data formats' },
    { title: 'Mobile Build Audit', detail: 'Checking Capacitor, Android, and iOS configurations' },
    { title: 'State & Auth Audit', detail: 'Analyzing state management and authentication flows' },
    { title: 'Synthesis', detail: 'Compiling all findings into actionable report' }
  ],
};


const PROJECT_ROOT = 'C:\\Users\\user\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\rez-v5\\Homeservice';

// Phase 1: Project Discovery
phase('Project Discovery');

const structure = await parallel([
  () => agent(`Explore frontend structure at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/frontend/src. List all directories, pages, components, services, stores with brief descriptions. Return structured JSON with file paths and purposes.`, {phase: 'Project Discovery', label: 'frontend-structure'}),
  () => agent(`Explore backend structure at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/backend/src. List all directories, models, controllers, routes, services with brief descriptions. Return structured JSON with file paths and purposes.`, {phase: 'Project Discovery', label: 'backend-structure'}),
  () => agent(`Explore mobile build configuration at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/frontend. Check capacitor.config.ts, android/, ios/, package.json scripts. List key configuration files and their purposes.`, {phase: 'Project Discovery', label: 'mobile-config'}),
]);

log(`Discovered ${structure.flat().length} key files across the project`);


// Phase 2: Dashboard Analysis (parallel sub-agents for each dashboard)
phase('Dashboard Analysis');
const dashboardFindings = await parallel([
  () => agent(`Audit Customer Dashboard at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx and related components.

Analyze:
1. All customer pages (HomePage, SearchPage, BookServicesPage, etc.)
2. Customer services in frontend/src/services/
3. Customer stores in frontend/src/stores/
4. API endpoints being called

Identify:
- Working workflows (browsing, booking, payments, reviews)
- API connections and their status
- Dummy/hardcoded data
- Missing API connections
- Data format mismatches
- Missing error handling
- 404 or broken routes
- Authentication issues

Return: JSON with {workflows: [], issues: [{severity, file, line, description, fix}]}`, {phase: 'Dashboard Analysis', label: 'customer-dashboard'}),
  
  () => agent(`Audit Provider Dashboard at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/frontend/src/pages/provider/

Analyze:
1. All provider pages (ProviderDashboard, ManagedServicesPage, InsightsDashboard, etc.)
2. Provider services in frontend/src/services/
3. Provider stores in frontend/src/stores/
4. Availability management (ServiceAvailabilityManager, etc.)
5. Earnings and payout workflows

Identify:
- Working workflows (service management, scheduling, earnings)
- API connections and their status
- Time slot validation issues
- Bundle endpoint mismatches
- Missing error handling
- Route protection issues

Return: JSON with {workflows: [], issues: [{severity, file, line, description, fix}]}`, {phase: 'Dashboard Analysis', label: 'provider-dashboard'}),
  
  () => agent(`Audit Super Admin Dashboard at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/frontend/src/pages/admin/

Analyze:
1. All admin pages (AdminDashboard, AnalyticsDashboard, ProviderManagement, etc.)
2. Admin components in frontend/src/components/admin/
3. Admin services in frontend/src/services/
4. Backend admin routes and controllers

Identify:
- Working workflows (user management, provider approval, analytics)
- API connections and their status
- Dummy/hardcoded data
- Missing API connections
- Data format mismatches
- Missing error handling
- Security issues (test endpoints, exposed data)

Return: JSON with {workflows: [], issues: [{severity, file, line, description, fix}]}`, {phase: 'Dashboard Analysis', label: 'admin-dashboard'}),
]);

log(`Analyzed 3 dashboards: Customer, Provider, Admin`);

// Phase 3: API & Backend Audit
phase('API & Backend Audit');
const backendFindings = await parallel([
  () => agent(`Audit Backend API routes at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/backend/src/routes/

Analyze:
1. All route files - check route order (/:id before /:id/print?)
2. Collection mismatches (Service vs Bundle)
3. Validation schemas (Joi)
4. Authentication middleware
5. Tenant isolation
6. Rate limiting

Identify:
- Route order issues
- Missing exports from controllers
- Collection mismatches
- Data format issues
- Security vulnerabilities
- Missing validations

Return: JSON with {routes: [], issues: [{severity, file, line, description, fix}]}`, {phase: 'API & Backend Audit', label: 'backend-routes'}),
  
  () => agent(`Audit Backend controllers at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/backend/src/controllers/

Analyze:
1. All controller functions
2. Error handling patterns
3. Response formats
4. Database queries
5. Security checks (IDOR protection)


Identify:
- Missing error responses
- Inconsistent response formats
- Query optimization opportunities
- Security issues
- Missing validations

Return: JSON with {controllers: [], issues: [{severity, file, line, description, fix}]}`, {phase: 'API & Backend Audit', label: 'backend-controllers'}),
  
  () => agent(`Audit Frontend-Backend API integration at ${PROJECT_ROOT}

Analyze:
1. Frontend services (frontend/src/services/*.ts)
2. Backend routes (backend/src/routes/*.ts)
3. Check for mismatches between:
   - Endpoint paths
   - Request/response formats
   - Field names (_id vs id, serviceName vs name)
   - Data types

Identify:
- Missing API connections
- Data format mismatches
- Field name inconsistencies
- Type mismatches

Return: JSON with {mismatches: [], issues: [{severity, file, line, description, fix}]}`, {phase: 'API & Backend Audit', label: 'api-integration'}),
]);

log(`Audited backend API routes, controllers, and frontend integration`);

// Phase 4: Mobile Build Audit
phase('Mobile Build Audit');
const mobileFindings = await agent(`Audit Mobile build configuration at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/frontend

Analyze:
1. capacitor.config.ts - server URL, plugins, splash screen
2. android/ - build.gradle, AndroidManifest.xml, google-services.json
3. ios/ - Info.plist, background modes
4. Mobile-specific code in frontend (plugins, native features)
5. PWA configuration (manifest.json, service worker)

Identify:
- Android build configuration issues
- Missing permissions or configurations
- Mobile-specific feature implementations
- Capacitor plugin setup
- Build errors that could occur
- Hardcoded URLs that won't work on mobile
- Platform-specific code issues

Return: JSON with {config: {}, issues: [{severity, file, description, fix}]}`, {phase: 'Mobile Build Audit', label: 'mobile-audit'});

log(`Audited mobile build configuration`);

// Phase 5: State & Auth Audit (excluding auth fixes)
phase('State & Auth Audit');
const stateFindings = await agent(`Audit State Management at ${PROJECT_ROOT}/frontend/src/stores/

Analyze:
1. All Zustand stores (authStore, bookingStore, paymentStore, etc.)
2. State persistence configuration
3. State synchronization between stores
4. Memory leaks or stale data issues

Identify:
- State management patterns and potential issues
- Missing state clearing on logout
- State persistence issues
- Memory leaks
- Race conditions

Return: JSON with {stores: [], issues: [{severity, file, line, description, fix}]}`, {phase: 'State & Auth Audit', label: 'state-management'});

log(`Audited state management and stores`);

// Phase 6: Synthesis
phase('Synthesis');
const allFindings = {
  projectStructure: structure.flat(),
  dashboards: dashboardFindings.flat(),
  backend: backendFindings.flat(),
  mobile: mobileFindings,
  state: stateFindings
};

// Count issues by severity
const critical = allFindings.flat().filter(f => f.severity === 'CRITICAL' || f.severity === 'critical').length;
const high = allFindings.flat().filter(f => f.severity === 'HIGH' || f.severity === 'high').length;
const medium = allFindings.flat().filter(f => f.severity === 'MEDIUM' || f.severity === 'medium').length;
const low = allFindings.flat().filter(f => f.severity === 'LOW' || f.severity === 'low').length;


log(`Synthesis complete: ${critical} critical, ${high} high, ${medium} medium, ${low} low priority issues found`);


return allFindings;
